narrative:
Wayne Township has 1,007 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.0 percentage points.
